terminology: AIM-9X: Cage/Uncage button on the throttle

source.section: 5 - JHMCS (Joint Helmet-Mounted Cueing System) > 5.5 - JHMCS Functions > 5.5.3 - AIM-9X Up-Look Cueing

steps.action: Select AIM-9X Sidewinder missile (Weapon Select Switch DOWN)
Set TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) priority to the Helmet Display by pressing Sensor Control Switch FWD
Press the Sensor Control Switch AFT to enter Up-Look Cueing.

Uncage AIM-9X (Cage/Uncage button on the throttle) and place Up-Look Reticle on target, which allows you to launch AIM-9X missiles beyond radar limits. (Note: this function is not fully implemented yet.) Up-Look Reticle Line of Sight HMD Reticle Line of Sight Helmet Direction Up-Look Reticle Line of Sight HMD Reticle Line of Sight
